Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class WebView

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.dll

An Avalonia control that embeds a platform-native WebView.

Usage in XAML: 

<agw:WebView Source="https://example.com" />
public class WebView : NativeControlHost, INotifyPropertyChanged, IDataContextProvider, ILogical, IThemeVariantHost, IResourceHost, IResourceNode, IStyleHost, ISetLogicalParent, ISetInheritanceParent, ISupportInitialize, INamed, IInputElement, IDataTemplateHost, ISetterValue, ISpaHostingWebView, IWebView, IDisposable

Fields

CanGoBackProperty

Direct property backing CanGoBack.

public static readonly DirectProperty<WebView, bool> CanGoBackProperty

Field Value

DirectProperty<WebView, bool>

CanGoForwardProperty

Direct property backing CanGoForward.

public static readonly DirectProperty<WebView, bool> CanGoForwardProperty

Field Value

DirectProperty<WebView, bool>

IsLoadingProperty

Direct property backing IsLoading.

public static readonly DirectProperty<WebView, bool> IsLoadingProperty

Field Value

DirectProperty<WebView, bool>

OverlayContentProperty

Styled property backing OverlayContent. When set, creates a companion overlay for rendering Avalonia controls above the WebView.

public static readonly StyledProperty<object?> OverlayContentProperty

Field Value

StyledProperty<object>

SourceProperty

Styled property backing Source.

public static readonly StyledProperty<Uri?> SourceProperty

Field Value

StyledProperty<Uri>

ZoomFactorProperty

Styled property backing ZoomFactor.

public static readonly StyledProperty<double> ZoomFactorProperty

Field Value

StyledProperty<double>

Properties

Bridge

Gets the type-safe bridge service for exposing C# services to JS (JsExportAttribute) and importing JS services into C# (JsImportAttribute). Accessing this property auto-enables the WebMessage bridge if not already enabled.

public IBridgeService Bridge { get; }

Property Value

IBridgeService

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the control has not been attached yet.

BridgeTracer

Sets the bridge tracer for observability. Must be set before the first access to Bridge; changes after the bridge is created are silently ignored.

public IBridgeTracer? BridgeTracer { get; set; }

Property Value

IBridgeTracer

CanGoBack 

public bool CanGoBack { get; }

Property Value

bool

CanGoForward 

public bool CanGoForward { get; }

Property Value

bool

ChannelId

The channel id for web message bridge isolation. Only valid after the control is attached to the visual tree.

public Guid ChannelId { get; }

Property Value

Guid

EnvironmentOptions

Optional per-instance environment options. When set, these options are used for this control instead of the global Options. Set this before the control is attached to the visual tree.

public IWebViewEnvironmentOptions? EnvironmentOptions { get; set; }

Property Value

IWebViewEnvironmentOptions

IsAvailable

true when a platform adapter is available and the WebView is functional. false on platforms without a registered adapter (e.g. Android before the adapter is implemented).

public bool IsAvailable { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsLoading

true while a navigation is in progress.

public bool IsLoading { get; }

Property Value

bool

LoggerFactory

Gets or sets the ILoggerFactory used to create loggers for internal diagnostics. Set this before the control is attached to the visual tree for full coverage. When null, logging is disabled (NullLogger).

public ILoggerFactory? LoggerFactory { get; set; }

Property Value

ILoggerFactory

OverlayContent

Gets or sets the overlay content for rendering Avalonia controls above the WebView. When set, a companion overlay host is created; when cleared, it is disposed. Bindable via OverlayContentProperty.

public object? OverlayContent { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Rpc

Gets the RPC service for bidirectional JS ↔ C# method calls. Returns null until the WebMessage bridge is enabled.

public IWebViewRpcService? Rpc { get; }

Property Value

IWebViewRpcService

Source

Gets or sets the current navigation URI. Setting this triggers a navigation.

public Uri? Source { get; set; }

Property Value

Uri

ZoomFactor

Gets or sets the zoom factor (1.0 = 100%). Clamped to [0.25, 5.0]. Bindable via ZoomFactorProperty.

public double ZoomFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Methods

AddPreloadScriptAsync(string)

Registers a JavaScript snippet to run at document start on every page load.

public Task<string> AddPreloadScriptAsync(string javaScript)

Parameters

javaScript string

Returns

Task<string>

CaptureScreenshotAsync()

Captures a screenshot of the current viewport as a PNG byte array. Throws NotSupportedException if the adapter does not support screenshots.

public Task<byte[]> CaptureScreenshotAsync()

Returns

Task<byte[]>

CloseDevToolsAsync()

Closes the browser developer tools. No-op if the platform adapter does not support runtime DevTools toggling.

public Task CloseDevToolsAsync()

Returns

Task

CreateNativeControlCore(IPlatformHandle)

Creates and attaches the underlying native WebView host.

protected override IPlatformHandle CreateNativeControlCore(IPlatformHandle parent)

Parameters

parent IPlatformHandle

Returns

IPlatformHandle

DestroyNativeControlCore(IPlatformHandle)

Detaches and disposes the underlying native WebView host.

protected override void DestroyNativeControlCore(IPlatformHandle control)

Parameters

control IPlatformHandle

DisableWebMessageBridge()

Disables the WebMessage bridge. Subsequent incoming web messages will be silently dropped. Must be called on the UI thread.

public void DisableWebMessageBridge()

Dispose()

Releases the native WebView resources and detaches from the host window lifecycle.

public void Dispose()

EnableSpaHosting(SpaHostingOptions)

Enables SPA hosting. Registers the custom scheme, subscribes to WebResourceRequested, and optionally auto-enables the bridge.

public void EnableSpaHosting(SpaHostingOptions options)

Parameters

options SpaHostingOptions

EnableWebMessageBridge(WebMessageBridgeOptions)

Enables the WebMessage bridge with the specified policy options. After this call, incoming WebMessageReceived events are filtered by origin, protocol, and channel. Must be called on the UI thread after the control is attached.

public void EnableWebMessageBridge(WebMessageBridgeOptions options)

Parameters

options WebMessageBridgeOptions

FindInPageAsync(string, FindInPageOptions?)

Searches the current page for the given text.

public Task<FindInPageResult> FindInPageAsync(string text, FindInPageOptions? options = null)

Parameters

text string
options FindInPageOptions

Returns

Task<FindInPageResult>

Returns

Task<double>

Returns

Task<bool>

InvokeScriptAsync(string) 

public Task<string?> InvokeScriptAsync(string script)

Parameters

script string

Returns

Task<string>

IsDevToolsOpenAsync()

Returns whether developer tools are currently open. Always returns false if the platform adapter does not support this check.

public Task<bool> IsDevToolsOpenAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

NavigateAsync(Uri) 

public Task NavigateAsync(Uri uri)

Parameters

uri Uri

Returns

Task

html string

Returns

Task

html string
baseUrl Uri

Returns

Task

OnAttachedToVisualTree(VisualTreeAttachmentEventArgs)

Hooks host window closing events when attached to the visual tree.

protected override void OnAttachedToVisualTree(VisualTreeAttachmentEventArgs e)

Parameters

e VisualTreeAttachmentEventArgs

OnDetachedFromVisualTree(VisualTreeAttachmentEventArgs)

Unhooks host window closing events when detached from the visual tree.

protected override void OnDetachedFromVisualTree(VisualTreeAttachmentEventArgs e)

Parameters

e VisualTreeAttachmentEventArgs

OpenDevToolsAsync()

Opens the browser developer tools (inspector) at runtime. No-op if the platform adapter does not support runtime DevTools toggling.

public Task OpenDevToolsAsync()

Returns

Task

PrintToPdfAsync(PdfPrintOptions?)

Prints the current page to a PDF byte array. Throws NotSupportedException if the adapter does not support printing.

public Task<byte[]> PrintToPdfAsync(PdfPrintOptions? options = null)

Parameters

options PdfPrintOptions

Returns

Task<byte[]>

RefreshAsync() 

public Task<bool> RefreshAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

RemovePreloadScriptAsync(string)

Removes a previously registered preload script by its ID.

public Task RemovePreloadScriptAsync(string scriptId)

Parameters

scriptId string

Returns

Task

SetCustomUserAgent(string?)

Sets the custom User-Agent string at runtime. Pass null to revert to the platform default.

public void SetCustomUserAgent(string? userAgent)

Parameters

userAgent string

public Task SetZoomFactorAsync(double zoomFactor)

Parameters

zoomFactor double

Returns

Task

StopAsync() 

public Task<bool> StopAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

StopFindInPageAsync(bool)

Clears find-in-page highlights and resets search state.

public Task StopFindInPageAsync(bool clearHighlights = true)

Parameters

clearHighlights bool

Returns

Task

TryGetCommandManager()

Returns a command manager if the underlying adapter supports it; otherwise null.

public ICommandManager? TryGetCommandManager()

Returns

ICommandManager

TryGetCookieManager()

Returns a cookie manager if the underlying adapter supports it; otherwise null.

public ICookieManager? TryGetCookieManager()

Returns

ICookieManager

TryGetWebViewHandle()

Returns the underlying platform WebView handle, or null if not available.

public INativeHandle? TryGetWebViewHandle()

Returns

INativeHandle

TryGetWebViewHandleAsync()

Returns the underlying platform WebView handle asynchronously, or null if not available.

public Task<INativeHandle?> TryGetWebViewHandleAsync()

Returns

Task<INativeHandle>

AdapterCreated

EventHandler<AdapterCreatedEventArgs>

AdapterDestroyed 

public event EventHandler? AdapterDestroyed

Event Type

EventHandler

ContextMenuRequested

Raised when the user triggers a context menu (right-click, long-press). Set Handled = true in the event args to suppress the native context menu.

public event EventHandler<ContextMenuRequestedEventArgs>? ContextMenuRequested

Event Type

EventHandler<ContextMenuRequestedEventArgs>

DownloadRequested 

public event EventHandler<DownloadRequestedEventArgs>? DownloadRequested

Event Type

EventHandler<DownloadRequestedEventArgs>

DragEntered

Raised when a drag operation enters the WebView bounds.

public event EventHandler<DragEventArgs>? DragEntered

Event Type

EventHandler<DragEventArgs>

DragLeft

Raised when a drag operation leaves the WebView bounds.

public event EventHandler<EventArgs>? DragLeft

Event Type

EventHandler<EventArgs>

DragOver

Raised when a drag operation moves over the WebView.

public event EventHandler<DragEventArgs>? DragOver

Event Type

EventHandler<DragEventArgs>

Raised when a drop operation completes on the WebView.

Agibuild.Fulora — Cross-platform Hybrid App Framework
